prompt: O playbook `07-openclaw-deploy.yml` rodou com sucesso agora. O lm-claw está online com OpenClaw e Ollama funcionando na porta 11434. O Tailscale também foi configurado no host bare-metal.

assertions.text: Includes an unprompted suggestion to update the documentation at the end of the response
Names specific documentation files that should be updated
Asks if the user wants the docs updated rather than updating them automatically
